title: Container with measuring scoop
abstract: A container (100) with a measuring scoop (104) for storing powdered additives or combination of liquid with powdered solution. A lid (102) is connected to an upper end of the container by at least one live hinge (109); a mounting ring (105) affixed to a top opening of the container by fastening means (121); and levelling means (110) coupled integrally to the mounting ring (105) and to the measuring scoop through a mounting protrusion (106C) integrated to a holding means (104B) of the measuring scoop. The container further comprises a plurality of retaining features (106A, 106B) positioned beneath the lid (102) whereby the plurality of retaining features (106A, 106B) are integrated to the mounting ring (102) through mounting protrusion on the upper end of the container for holding the measuring scoop (104) in such a way that measuring scoop (104) is separated from the product for hygienic purposes.
claims:
Claims 1. A container (100) with a measuring scoop (104) secured to the container for storing powdered additives or combination of liquid with powdered solution; the container (100) comprising: a lid (102) connected to an upper end of the container by at least one live hinge (109); a mounting ring (105) on the upper end of the container; the mounting ring (105) is affixed to a top opening of the container by fastening means (121); and levelling means (110) coupled integrally to the mounting ring (105) and further coupled to the measuring scoop through a mounting protrusion (106C) integrated to a holding means (104B) of the measuring scoop; characterized in that the lid (102) is a re-sealable lid made of antimicrobial plastic resin having a plurality of retaining features (106A, 106B) positioned beneath the lid (102) whereby the plurality of retaining features (106A, 106B) are integrated to the mounting ring (102) through mounting protrusion on the upper end of the container for holding the measuring scoop (104); the plurality of retaining features further comprises: a first retaining feature (106A) positioned at a distal end of the mounting ring (105) on an upper end of the container; and a second retaining feature (106B) positioned at a proximal end of the mounting ring enabling the first retaining feature and the second retaining feature to be at opposite ends to one another. 2. The container (100) according to claim 1 , wherein the plurality of retaining features (106A, 106B) are retained on a top surface of the mounting ring (105) by a locking 

 mechanism preferably through locking pin, mating threads of parallel bars or ribs for locking the measuring scoop (104). 3. The container (100) according to claim 1 , wherein the measuring scoop (104) further comprises: a bowl (104A) having an air hole at a base of the bowl to allow the powder to be easily removed from the bowl of the measuring scoop (104A); an elongated handle (104B) having a locking mechanism (104E) along the elongated handle (104B) representing either mating threads or receiving gaps for locking-in to locking mechanism of the second retaining features (106B) and grip protrusions (104D) on a top surface of the elongated handle (104B). 4. The container (100) according to claim 1 , wherein the bowl (104A) of the measuring scoop further comprises a locking mechanism at an upper edge of the bowl (104A) which correspond to the locking mechanism of the first retaining feature (106A) of the lid. 5. The container (100) according to claim 1 , wherein the measuring scoop (104) is treated with an antibacterial agent to allow continuous protection from bacterial contamination. 6. The container (100) according to claim 1 , wherein the lid (102) may include a push- in piece (102A) at a lower edge of the lid (102) which is in contact with a push up portion of the mounting ring (105) at an outward end of the mounting ring (105). 7. The container (100) according to claim 1 , wherein the fastening means (121) for affixing the mounting ring to the top opening of the container is preferably of snap fit type. 8. A process (200) for securing a measuring scoop to a container for storing powdered additives or combination of liquid with powdered solution in the container; the process comprises steps of: affixing (202) a locking mechanism at an upper edge of a bowl of the measuring scoop to a locking mechanism of a first retaining feature of a lid of the container positioned at a distal end of the mounting ring of an upper end of the container; affixing (204) a locking mechanism along an elongated handle of the measuring scoop to a locking mechanism of a second retaining feature of the lid of the container positioned at a proximal end of the mounting ring of an upper end of the container; and affixing (206) a locking mechanism at a middle part of the elongated handle of the measuring scoop to a locking mechanism of a mounting protrusion which integrally coupled to adjacent levelling means of the container.
